description: If a player places their piece in one of the four center squares, they get an extra turn.

replay.mechanic_description: If a player places their piece in one of the four center squares, they get an extra turn.

description: If a player places a piece that surrounds an opponent's single piece horizontally or vertically, that opponent's piece is captured and removed from the board.
